title: Taras Bulba
author: Nikolai Gogol
description: Gogol’s revised 1842 novella, rooted in the Cossack era, interrogates the violent allure of national identity through the fanaticism of Taras, a Cossack chieftain who sacrifices his son Andriy for betraying Ukrainian solidarity during the Polish-Lithuanian siege. Blending mythic grandeur with grotesque brutality, the narrative oscillates between battlefield heroism and intimate tragedy, framing patriotism as both unifying creed and destructive force.
